purpose: S3-D: check whether gitleaks, Kingfisher, and Nosey Parker have added new credential detection rules since Sprint 10

sources.name: gitleaks
sources.details: HEAD on master is identical to Sprint 10 pinned SHA. No new rules since the last mine. 222 [[rules]] entries counted in config/gitleaks.toml at this commit.

sources.name: kingfisher
sources.details: HEAD on main is identical to Sprint 10 pinned SHA. No new rules since the last mine.

sources.name: noseyparker
sources.details: HEAD on main is identical to Sprint 10 pinned SHA. No new rules since the last mine.

summary.note: All three upstream sources are at exactly the Sprint 10 pinned commit. S3-D yields zero new patterns. No s3d_proposed_patterns.json is required.

verification_method.gitleaks_rule_count: curl raw config/gitleaks.toml | count '[[rules]]' — 222 rules at pinned SHA
